name: Tugboat Logic (OneTrust)

seo.meta_description: Tugboat Logic (OneTrust): Tugboat Logic (OneTrust) — Security compliance automation platform for SOC 2 and ISO 27001 with policy library and audit workflows.

when_to_use: SOC 2 readiness with policy library and evidence collection
ISO 27001 implementation guided workflow for startups
Security questionnaire automation for enterprise deals
Audit collaboration portal for external auditor access

pros: OneTrust ecosystem means deep privacy and GRC tooling
Large pre-built policy and control libraries
Workflow automation from evidence to audit
Strong analyst recognition in enterprise buys
cons: Acquisition integration has caused product confusion
review.verdict: Safe enterprise pick for OneTrust shops — standalone startups will find more focused tools elsewhere.
review.best_for: Enterprises already standardized on OneTrust privacy stack
review.not_for: Startups seeking a nimble, modern compliance UX
